summary: Frontend-only regression for Typewriter animation on /result. All 5 requested flows PASS on mobile viewport 390x844 via preview URL. Observed progressive char-by-char summary animation (lengths sampled 23 -> 45 -> 68 -> 90 -> 112 -> 133 across 5 seconds, then stable). After ~30s wait, all 7 stages are fully visible: medicine-name chip, SUMMARY, COMMON USES, DOSAGE NOTE, SAFETY TIPS, SIDE EFFECTS, WHEN TO SEE DOCTOR, and disclaimer-banner (count=1). Red-flag path for 'severe chest pain' still renders red-flag-banner at the top of result-card (count=1). Typing on home screen still works (no regression). Back-button navigates home. Language toggle click triggers UI language change (Hindi content rendered after toggle).
critical_code_review_comments: ResultCard uses a clean 7-stage state machine with auto-skip for empty sections (guards against stalls).
Typewriter component correctly clears timer on unmount and re-runs effect on text prop change.
TypedBulletList 'active' flag ensures past stages render full list instantly (no re-animation), while current stage types each bullet in sequence - good UX.

Voice transcription typewriter in app/index.tsx uses setInterval with 35ms cadence; clears on completion - no leak risk for short transcripts. Consider clearing the interval on unmount if user navigates away mid-typing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Typewriter feature validated end-to-end. Summary animation progression is observable via sampling result-summary innerText length every 400ms - expect ~20-25 char increments. Final summary stabilises around 130-150 chars. All 5 bullet/section stages + disclaimer-banner render within ~25-30s of API response. Red-flag path (severe chest pain) still works. Preview URL: https://medicine-scanner-3.preview.emergentagent.com, viewport 390x844. Language toggle testIDs are 'language-toggle' (tap target) and 'lang-en' (current indicator); only one toggle button - not separate EN/HI buttons.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Progressive typewriter verified by polling [data-testid=result-summary] innerText length across time; text length grew monotonically from 23 to 133 chars over ~5s (matches ~18ms/char * 133 = ~2.4s, additional time for sectional stages).
